section_title: We'll forward your issue to your credit card company, give you a tracking
section_path: We'll forward your issue to your credit card company, give you a tracking
citation_anchor: We'll forward your issue to your credit card company, give you a tracking
section_text: number, and keep you updated on the status of your complaint.
The CARD Act is often called the Credit Cardholders Bill of Rights.

section_title: President Obama signed the bill into law in May 2009. Many of the most

citation_anchor: President Obama signed the bill into law in May 2009. Many of the most
section_text: significant provisions of the law took effect in February 2010.
